title: Hina Optimized
description: The official modpack for the OfflineTV Community Minecraft Server, but you can use it for anything else too :)
body:
# Yep! Another optimization modpack :)
 
## Hina Optimized
Hina Optimized, inspired by [Kami Chan Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/kami-chan-optimized) also uses some of the most well known Fabric performance mods to help optimize your Vanilla experience.

Similar to our inspiration, this modpack will work in any world and on any server.

### OfflineTV Community
For the community who this modpack is named after, we've included Simple Voice Chat in case you'd like to participate in our voice community. 

Casual users, feel free to toggle this mod off. 

#### Extras Mode

Each release will include an extras variant including other mods recommended by the OfflineTV Community!

### Open source
We're a completely open source modpack. You can view our source code [here](https://github.com/partyhatgg/OTV-Modpack), or with the Source button on the left sidebar.

Feel free to open issues or even create a PR to improve on the pack! We'll try our hardest to move with the community by providing major version updates when it's best to - not as soon as possible.

### Credits / About

This modpack is not monetized and never will be. 

This modpack includes the following mods by xaero96, distributed and downloaded from their respective Modrinth pages: 
- [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)

- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)
